name: Texas Fitness Supplement Outreach
objective: Drive sample requests for new pre-workout formula
messageTemplate: Hi {{displayName}}, we've been following your content and love how you break down fitness for your audience. We'd love to send you a free sample of our new pre-workout formula — no strings attached. Would you be open to trying it?

name: Beauty Launch DM Campaign
objective: Announce new skincare line and invite to affiliate program
messageTemplate: Hey {{displayName}}! We just launched our new clean skincare line and your content is exactly the vibe we're going for. Would love to have you as one of our founding partners — affiliate commission + free full routine. Interested?

name: Wellness Email Sequence
objective: Introduce adaptogen supplement line to wellness creators
messageTemplate: Hi {{displayName}}, I came across your content on TikTok and think there's a genuine fit between what you share and our adaptogen product line. We'd love to send you our starter kit to test — completely complimentary. Let me know if you'd be interested.
